content: Just as linguistic reflection (the vocabulary meaning from Topic A) functions as a mirror that maps inner thought to outer language and vice versa, the AI Reflexion and Self-Refine frameworks can be adapted to incorporate a linguistic reflection step: after each iterative self-refinement, the agent rephrases its current output into plain, human-aligned language to surface hidden gaps in its reasoning that internal self-feedback would miss. This creates a dual-layer feedback loop that combines the iterative refinement of Self-Refine with the dynamic memory grounding of Reflexion through the reflective act of linguistic translation.
